policy.reason: Sofascore wrappers are unofficial scraper clients. They are only allowed for isolated package/API-surface feasibility checks and must not write normalized, model, or public API data.

wrapper.notes: PyPI description says it uses scrapling/curl_cffi impersonation and is educational/research only; not actively maintained.

notes: This runner must not add Sofascore wrappers to project dependencies.
It may install packages only into a temporary venv for isolated diagnostics.
Do not run live scraping from this runner; it only checks package/API surface through probe_sofascore_wrappers.py.
reason: Pass --install to create a temporary venv and install the allowlisted wrapper package.
